She knows all the verbal cues - sit, stay, come, heel, paw

We find her to be a bit of a ham for the cam-so cute!

She lived very well with a woman, male & female cats and a 45 lb dog & went to doggie daycare groups

She stayed home alone, loose in her home, never causing problems

She's also crate trained which is a nice skill to have for travel

Walks, chews and squeaky toys are among her favorite things!


We can't wait for you to meet this proper yet fun lady. Ask staff to get her out. She has an volunteer advocate group in ClassicCaninesATX - feel free to connect at caring@classiccanines.org

name: Dannie
description_html:
Meet Dannie ~ The newest member of the social mixer


Arriving in a shelter at 12 is no laughing matter but this sweet lady came on the scene with a nice energy and a sunny disposition at all times. She truly loves the many friends she makes in people, kids and dog friends and maybe even cat friends (we'll let you know!).

She's staying in a foster family home where she's proven great house manners. She goes for walks daily and wants to be in the middle of all the family activities. She'll eventually flop down for a recharge nap and then be ready for the next round of family fun. She sleeps through the night soundly to prepare for each day ahead.

While she's in her foster home she's getting her wellness needs taken care of through sponsorship by ClassicCaninesATX so her health will be tip top for the rest of her years to come, for picnics, park trips, tenting it with the kids in the yard, and anything else she can hone in on.

Are you looking for a sweet lady that fits in everywhere? Reach out on her link to start a conversation with her foster or reach out to caring@classiccanines.org

See my short video here

name: Kacey
description_html: Kacey is a young guy, only 6 months old, looking for his new fur-ever home! He was brought in as a stray and we don't know much more about his past, except we know he was loved, because he loves pets and is very outgoing when he feels comfortable! He is a vocal kitty, who will chirp and meow at you in greeting, and loves to rub against your legs for pets! We don't know if he would get along with another kitty or a doggy friend, but if you introduce them slowly, keep them separate at first, and give them plenty of time to get used to each other, the chances are good! Being at the shelter can be a scary, stressful place, so sometimes he may hiss or run away if he hears something loud or you move a little too fast - he's still settling in and showing us who he is, but one thing we know if he is a sweet cat who deserves a fur-ever home indoors. Ask staff if you are interested in meeting Kacey!

name: Amber
description_html: Amber is a very good little baby who likes to play with her siblings and people, and likes to climb to be the highest in the room. She enjoys getting pets and head massages. This kitten will require a constant companion in her new home, ideally another playful kitten. Experienced with kids and adult cats, and litter box trained.

name: Ruby
description_html: This petite little baby is a bundle of love and energy! She loves people, playing with her siblings, and running as fast as possible to escape through all doors. This kitten will require a constant companion in her new home, ideally another playful kitten. Experienced with kids and adult cats, and litter box trained.

name: Lisa
description_html: This beautiful kitty is so friendly! She loves to play and interact with people, is happy for her foster family to carry her around the house, and is very talkative when she wants something. She is really easy going and likes to be in the middle of the household action. Lisa has been raising her babies and is ready to have the attention all to herself and possibly other furry friends. Great with all ages of human; she has had brief and positive introductions so far with resident cats and dog in her foster home.

name: Opal
description_html: This little sweetheart is affectionate, playful and brave. She is quite adventurous and likes to be the first to come explore a new space. This kitten will require a constant companion in her new home, ideally another playful kitten. Experienced with kids and adult cats, and litter box trained.

name: Rocky
description_html: Rocky (aka Rock Star) is sweet and independent. This very playful boy likes to find his own secret nap spots (such as inside shoes or cubbies, or on soft blankets). He loves people and raises his back and head into their pets. This kitten will require a constant companion in his new home, ideally another playful kitten. Experienced with kids and adult cats, and litter box trained.

name: Nachito
description_html:
Nachito is looking for a fresh start in life that will provide him the comforts and privileges of an indoors, much loved member of the family. He and his dog family spent a few hard years being exposed to the weather and it's time for a silver lining, a "happily ever after". Nachito is very sweet and a charmer and when you're not looking he'll steal the treats from your pocket. He's learning to have his own confidence on a leash. He appreciates having cushioned comfort, good meals, people and pets to kick things up a notch with and yes, opportunities for some treat thievery. He's endearing. Nachito has also successfully stayed in a crate.

Here's a chance to make real change in a life where it will be so very appreciated by him and he promises he'll stop the treat theft just as soon as he's fully reconditioned.

name: Sam Dog
description_html:
Sam Dog is a lady looking for a fresh start in life to provide her the comforts and privileges of an indoors, much loved member of the family. She and her dog family spent a few hard years being exposed to the weather and it's time for a silver lining, a "happily ever after". Sam Dog is very sweet and gentle, yet isn't shy about telling you what she wants. She's learning to have her own confidence on a leash. She appreciates having cushioned comfort, good meals, people and pets to hang out with. She's also stayed in a crate successfully.

Here's a chance to make real change in a life where it will be so very appreciated by her and she/ll never forget who gave her that opportunity.

name: Felicia
description_html:
Felicia is looking for a fresh start in life that will provide her the comforts and privileges of an indoors, much loved member of the family. She and her dog family spent a few hard years being exposed to the weather and it's time for a silver lining, a "happily ever after". Felicia is gentle, sweet and easy and walks nicely on a leash. She appreciates having cushioned comfort, good meals, a few treats and plenty of good loving.

Here's a chance to make real change in a life where it will be so very appreciated by her. and she will repay you in doggie kisses many times over.
